div.head:
No. 2
Editorial Note
div.p: The text of an agreement concerning United States economic and military assistance to the Republic of China, effected by an exchange of notes signed at Taipei on December 29, 1951 and January 2, 1952, is printed in Department of State Treaties and Other International Acts Series (TIAS) 2604 or United States Treaties and Other International Agreements (UST), volume 3 (pt. 4), page 4543.
